name: TodoListBlueprint
description: A full-featured task list with add, complete, and delete functionality. Includes filter tabs for All, Active, and Completed items with an item count display. Ideal for task managers, checklists, and to-do apps.

visual.description: Centered card with a header, input row for adding tasks, filter tabs (All/Active/Completed), scrollable task list with checkboxes and delete buttons, and a footer showing item counts.
visual.layout: vertical stack with input, tabs, list, and footer

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed at the top of the todo list

props.name: initialItems
props.description: Initial array of todo items with id, text, and completed status

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the add task input
